About

About Me

I am a 24 year old data science analyst at a financial services company. I have previously worked as a data platform engineer for two years. I hold a B.S. in Computer Science from Purdue University. I am currently a graduate student at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign. I don’t know what I like to do in my free time because I haven’t had free time over the past couple of years. I like mathematics, traveling to new places, and spending time with friends.

About This Website

I started this website because who doesn’t want to have their own website!?!? It’s a medium for me to document and post whatever I want, whenever I want! After you leave, please don’t forget to come back again soon!
